content.problemStatement:
**Scenario:** \
You are working on a project that has a single file, `index.html`.
You make some temporary changes:
```sss
Temporary Heading
```
You decide to save this work for later without committing, so you run:
```sss
git stash
```
After checking the stash list, you realize **you no longer need these changes**.

**Question:** \
Which Git command(s) will remove this stash safely without restoring the changes?
